parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: A prefix to filter the people to look for

parameters.name: confirmed
parameters.description: List only active users. This parameter is interpreted as `true` if present, `false` otherwise.

200.description:
OK. The request has succeeded.
XML Schema used for body validation: [directory.xsd](../schema/directory.xsd)

post.summary: Executes a command on the person endpoint.
post.description:
Allows executing command on the person endpoint.

As of now, the only command allowed is 'register'.

requestBody.description: The data for the person to register.
